title: amaryllis × attenuata
intro: Amaryllis × attenuata, also known as the Belladonna Lily, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include being a source of atropine, a tropane alkaloid with anticholinergic effects. The health benefits of Amaryllis × attenuata include being used to treat various conditions such as eye infections, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, although it is essential to note that its use can be toxic in large quantities. Herbal preparations of Amaryllis × attenuata include extracts and tinctures, which are typically used under the guidance of a medical professional.
